overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a mountain trail at dusk. The scene transitions from open rocky terrain with distant mountain views through a forested area with snow patches, ending at a dark cave entrance. The lighting shifts from twilight to near-darkness as the character progresses.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the mountain path with swords on his back

entered.detail: Large snow-covered mountain peak visible in the distance against the twilight sky
Cluster of tall pine trees on the left side of the trail
Large rock outcrop and boulders on the right side of the path
Wooden stakes and fortification structures along the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide mountain trail at dusk with Geralt walking forward. A snow-capped mountain dominates the distant center view, while pine forests line the left and rocky cliffs rise on the right. Wooden fortification stakes are visible along the path.

events.description: passing wooden fortifications and approaching stone wall section on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path with a wide valley vista opening up to the right

entered.detail: Low stone wall running alongside the right side of the path
Open view of the valley below with distant lights visible in the twilight

segments.scene_description: The path continues along a stone wall on the right with an expansive valley vista opening up. The snow-capped mountain shifts to the left as the camera moves forward. Distant lights are visible in the valley below, and the pine forest draws closer on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest passage with snow patches

events.description: entering denser forest area with snow patches appearing on the ground

agents.ego_description: walking through a rocky passage with snow patches and denser tree cover

entered.detail: Massive snow-dusted boulder on the right side of the trail
Patches of snow covering parts of the ground and rocks

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions to a denser forest setting with large boulders and snow patches on the ground. The stone wall and valley view disappear as the path winds through rocky terrain with thickening tree cover on both sides.

events.description: ambient light drops significantly as the path enters deeply shaded forest area
cave entrance becomes visible ahead on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching a dark cave entrance while walking through the dimly lit forest

entered.detail: Dark cave opening visible ahead on the right side of the mountain

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a deeply shaded forest with very low light. A cave entrance becomes visible on the right, growing larger as the character approaches. The snow-capped mountain is no longer visible, and the dense trees create an enclosed, dark atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail at dusk that gradually transitions from an expansive alpine vista into a dark, enclosed forest. It begins on a wide path flanked by wooden fortification stakes, with a massive snow-capped mountain dominating the horizon between rocky cliffs and distant pine forests. As the camera moves forward, the path follows a stone wall that opens up to a vast valley vista with flickering distant lights, while the mountain shifts toward the left of the frame. The scene then shifts into a denser forest where the valley view disappears, replaced by winding rocky terrain scattered with large boulders and patches of snow. Finally, the lighting dims into deep shadow as the camera pushes through thickening tree cover, leaving the mountain behind to reveal a dark cave entrance on the right.
